Lines.FullText: Adds a network interface to the dictionary of available interfaces.

Elements.RawText: Adds a network interface to the dictionary of available interfaces.

Brief.RawText: * @brief Adds a network interface to the dictionary of available interfaces.

Tags.RawText: @param networkInterface The available interface to add.

Lines.FullText: The name of available interface to add.

Elements.RawText: The name of available interface to add.

Tags.RawText: @param name The name of available interface to add.

Lines.FullText: The provided name should be unique within the device info as used as the key in the dictionary of available interfaces.

Description.RawText:
*
     * The provided name should be unique within the device info as used as the key in the dictionary of available interfaces.

Lines.FullText: Registers a newly connected client or re-registers a reconnected client.

Elements.RawText: Registers a newly connected client or re-registers a reconnected client.

Brief.RawText: * @brief Registers a newly connected client or re-registers a reconnected client.

Lines.FullText: If provided, represents the original ordinal number of the re-registered client.

Elements.RawText: If provided, represents the original ordinal number of the re-registered client.

Lines.FullText: If unassigned or exceeding the total number of clients ever registered (including those that were later deregistered),

Elements.RawText: If unassigned or exceeding the total number of clients ever registered (including those that were later deregistered),

Lines.FullText: it is set to the incremented total count; otherwise, the client is registered under the specified number.

Elements.RawText: it is set to the incremented total count; otherwise, the client is registered under the specified number.

Tags.RawText: @param clientInfo The connected client information object.

Lines.FullText: OPENDAQ_ERR_ALREADYEXISTS if a client with the specified number already registered.

Elements.RawText: OPENDAQ_ERR_ALREADYEXISTS if a client with the specified number already registered.

Tags.RawText: @return OPENDAQ_ERR_ALREADYEXISTS if a client with the specified number already registered.

Lines.FullText: Unregisters a previously connected client upon disconnection.

Elements.RawText: The number identifying the disconnected client.
